---
author: "Amelia Hines"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# Exploratory

## Libraries
```{r}

library(tidyverse)

```



## Emu Data
```{r}
emu1 <- read.table("emu/barcode01_unmapped.fastq.gz_silva_results_rel-abundance.tsv", 
                   sep = "\t",
                   header = TRUE)
emu_path <- list.files(path = "emu",
                       pattern = "\\.tsv$",
                       full.names = TRUE)
emu_abundance <- do.call(rbind, lapply(emu_path, function(file) {
  df <- read.table(file, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
  df$Sample_Name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))
  return(df)
})) %>% 
  setNames(c("taxi_id", "abundance", "superkingdom", "phylum", "class", "order", "family", "genus", "species", "estimated_counts", "sample_name")) %>% 
  mutate(sample_name = sub("_.*", "", sample_name)) %>% 
  filter(!taxi_id == "unmapped" &
           !taxi_id == "mapped_filtered" &
           !taxi_id == "mapped_unclassified")


```

```{r}
taxa_summary <- 
  emu_abundance  %>% 
  group_by(sample_name) %>% 
  summarize(taxa = n())
```

## Plots
```{r}
# Plot of superkingdom abundance
superkingdom_abundance <- 
  emu_abundance %>% 
  select(superkingdom, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ superkingdom + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = superkingdom)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "Superkingdom")
superkingdom_abundance

# Plot of phylum abundance
phylum_abundance <- 
  emu_abundance %>% 
  select(phylum, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ phylum + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = phylum)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "phylum")
phylum_abundance

# Plot of class abundance

class_abundance <- 
  emu_abundance %>% 
  select(class, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ class + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = class)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "class")
class_abundance

# Plot of order abundance

order_abundance <- 
  emu_abundance %>% 
  select(order, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ order + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = order)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "order")
order_abundance

```

## Merge and filter metadata and emu abundance
```{r}
metadata <- read.csv("Bison_nanopore_metadata (1).csv") 
   emu_abundance_merged <- merge(emu_abundance, metadata, by.x = "sample_name", 
                                 by.y =  "BarcodeNumber") 
     emu_abundance_filtered <- filter(emu_abundance_merged, !Name == "NEG_Extract" &
            !Name == "POS1" &
            !Name == "POS2" & 
            !Name == "POS3" &
            !Name == "POS4" &
            !Name == "NEG_PCR1" &
            !Name == "NEG_PCR2")
   emu_abundance_filtered
   
   emu_abundance_controls <- filter(emu_abundance_merged, !Name == "RL13" &
                                      !Name == "LB25" & 
                                      !Name == "HC33" &
                                      !Name == "DO23" &
                                      !Name == "HCB1" &
                                      !Name == "HCRD" &
                                      !Name == "DO30" &
                                      !Name == "GRS033" &
                                      !Name == "DO40ALT" &
                                      !Name == "SWG1" &
                                      !Name == "NY17" &
                                      !Name == "LB29" &
                                      !Name == "DL37ALT" &
                                      !Name == "LB21" &
                                      !Name == "HC10" &
                                      !Name == "GRN35" &
                                      !Name == "WP-MR-42" &
                                      !Name == "WP-MR-37" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_A12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_B12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_C12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_D12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_E12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_F12" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_A13" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_B13" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_C13" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_D13" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_E13" &
                                      !Name == "Mik_Bison_F13")
   emu_abundance_controls

```

## Plot Controls
```{r}
# Plot of superkingdom abundance
superkingdom_abundance_controls <- 
  emu_abundance_controls %>% 
  select(superkingdom, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ superkingdom + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = superkingdom)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "Superkingdom")
superkingdom_abundance_controls

# Plot of phylum abundance
phylum_abundance_controls <- 
  emu_abundance_controls %>% 
  select(phylum, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ phylum + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = phylum)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "phylum")
phylum_abundance_controls

# Plot of class abundance

class_abundance_controls <- 
  emu_abundance_controls %>% 
  select(class, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ class + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = class)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "class")
class_abundance_controls

# Plot of order abundance

order_abundance_controls <- 
  emu_abundance_controls %>% 
  select(order, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ order + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = order)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "order")
order_abundance_controls

#Plot of family abundance
family_abundance_controls <- 
  emu_abundance_controls %>% 
  select(family, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ family + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = family)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "family")
family_abundance_controls
```

## Plot just Samples
```{r}
superkingdom_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(superkingdom, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ superkingdom + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = superkingdom)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "Superkingdom")
superkingdom_abundance_samples

# Plot of phylum abundance
phylum_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(phylum, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ phylum + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = phylum)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "phylum")
phylum_abundance_samples

# Plot of class abundance

class_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(class, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ class + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = class)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "class")
class_abundance_samples

# Plot of order abundance

order_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(order, sample_name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ order + sample_name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = sample_name, y = estimated_counts, fill = order)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "sample", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "order")
order_abundance_samples

```

## Plot by Herd
```{r}
superkingdom_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(superkingdom, Name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ superkingdom + Name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = Name, y = estimated_counts, fill = superkingdom)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "herd", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "superkingdom")
superkingdom_abundance_samples

# Plot of phylum abundance
phylum_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(phylum, Name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ phylum + Name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = Name, y = estimated_counts, fill = phylum)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "herd", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "phylum")
phylum_abundance_samples

# Plot of class abundance

class_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(class, Name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ class + Name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = Name, y = estimated_counts, fill = class)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "herd", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "class")
class_abundance_samples

# Plot of order abundance

order_abundance_samples <- 
  emu_abundance_filtered %>% 
  select(order, Name, estimated_counts) %>% 
  aggregate(. ~ order +  Name, sum) %>% 
    ggplot(., aes(x = Name, y = estimated_counts, fill = order)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill")+
    labs(x = "herd", 
         y = "proportion of counts",
         fill = "order")
order_abundance_samples

```
